subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Wronged One unto him who hath turned towards God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, on a Day whereon the pillars of the world were shaken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اقبل الی الله المهیمن القیوم فی یوم فیه اضطربت ارکان العالم
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
